content: Maritime technology solutions include advanced products and services such as AI-powered fleet management, ECDIS navigation systems, radar surveillance, vessel traffic management, voyage data recorders, marine radar systems, maritime surveillance platforms, mobile device management for maritime healthcare, CCTV systems, emergency response simulators, and integrated communication networks. These solutions optimize vessel performance, enhance maritime safety, and improve operational efficiency in challenging maritime environments. Would you like information on specific products or services within maritime technology?

Marine Innovation is a maritime technology solutions provider focused on improving safety, efficiency, compliance, and operational intelligence across global maritime operations. Founded in 2015, Marine Innovation has over a decade of maritime industry experience delivering navigation, communication, surveillance, fleet intelligence, simulation training, and maritime healthcare solutions to shipping companies, fleet operators, and maritime training institutes. The company operates with ISO 9001 (Quality Management) and ISO 45001 (Occupational Health and Safety) certifications, ensuring reliable and standardized service delivery. Marine Innovation’s mission is to reduce maritime accidents by 3% by the year 2030 through smarter navigation technologies, integrated maritime systems, real-time operational intelligence, and enhanced crew training. Its vision is to become a leading provider of innovative technological solutions for the maritime industry globally. Marine Innovation delivers solutions across multiple domains including bridge navigation systems, fleet performance optimization, AI-powered fleet intelligence, maritime healthcare technology, emergency response simulation training, communication and networking systems, vessel surveillance systems, and marine technical services. The company provides end-to-end support including installation, commissioning, servicing, remote diagnostics, crew training, and technical consultation. In bridge navigation systems, Marine Innovation supplies Wärtsilä Navi-Sailor ECDIS, a future-ready Electronic Chart Display and Information System designed to improve situational awareness, voyage planning, and navigation safety. The system supports real-time chart updates, radar and AIS integration, route validation, weather data integration, ENC autoloading, and remote diagnostics. The system is S-100 ready, allowing future upgrades without hardware replacement, ensuring long-term compliance with evolving maritime standards such as SOLAS requirements, IHO S-52 and S-64 standards, and IEC 61174 type approval. Marine Innovation also provides flexible ECDIS leasing solutions that allow shipowners and fleet operators to upgrade navigation systems without large capital investment. The leasing program enables predictable operational costs, faster deployment, hardware lifecycle management, and continued compliance with modern navigation standards. Radar navigation solutions provided by Marine Innovation include HENSOLDT Kelvin Hughes S-Band radar systems and HENSOLDT Manta NEO X-Band radar systems. These radar systems use advanced signal processing and solid-state radar technology to deliver reliable target detection, clutter suppression, collision avoidance support, and situational awareness in congested waterways and challenging weather conditions. Voyage recording solutions include the Danelec Voyage Data Recorder (VDR), an IMO-compliant system that continuously records bridge audio, radar images, vessel position, and key operational parameters for safety analysis, incident investigation, and regulatory compliance. For fleet performance optimization, Marine Innovation provides Enamor Sea-Performer, a system designed to optimize vessel performance by improving ballast management, trim optimization, voyage planning, and fuel efficiency. This system helps shipowners reduce operational costs and improve sustainability performance. Marine Innovation also provides ShipIn FleetVision, an AI-powered fleet intelligence platform that uses computer vision technology to convert onboard camera feeds into real-time safety alerts, analytics, and operational insights. FleetVision enhances ship-to-shore visibility and enables fleet managers to monitor vessel operations remotely, improving safety, security, and decision-making. In training and simulation solutions, Marine Innovation provides the VSTEP Response Simulator, a high-fidelity maritime simulation platform designed for emergency response training, crisis management training, and vessel operation scenarios. The simulator provides realistic scenario-based training in a safe and controlled environment to improve crew preparedness and operational confidence. Marine Innovation delivers maritime healthcare technology through the MedAssist digital health ecosystem. This ecosystem includes the MedAssist Heart App for cardiovascular monitoring, the MedAssist Live App for telemedicine consultations between vessels and shore-based doctors, the MedAssist Skills App for onboard medical training, and mobile device management and hardware leasing solutions for maritime medical equipment deployment. These solutions ensure reliable healthcare access during long voyages. For communication and networking infrastructure, Marine Innovation provides the XC Network System, which delivers reliable ship-to-shore connectivity, onboard networking, voice communication, data communication, and internet connectivity using maritime-grade hardware and redundant communication pathways. Marine Innovation also provides ILJIN marine CCTV surveillance systems designed for vessel security and operational monitoring. These systems include weather-resistant cameras, motion detection capabilities, and remote monitoring functionality to support vessel safety and security management. In addition to technology solutions, Marine Innovation provides marine technical services including servicing of navigation equipment, servicing of communication equipment, installation and commissioning of maritime systems, preventive maintenance, remote diagnostics, system integration, onboard demonstrations, crew training programs, and technical consultation services. Marine Innovation collaborates with globally recognized maritime technology partners including Wärtsilä, HENSOLDT, Danelec, VSTEP, ShipIn, Enamor, MedAssist, and ILJIN to deliver integrated maritime solutions. Marine Innovation operates from its office located at 194 Pandan Loop, #06-01 Pantech Business Hub, Singapore 128383. Customers can contact Marine Innovation by phone at +65 6477 7737 or by email at sales@marinov.com.sg or info@marinov.com.sg. Marine Innovation’s solutions are designed to enhance maritime safety, improve operational efficiency, reduce costs, support regulatory compliance, and enable smarter fleet management through advanced technology, intelligent systems, and professional maritime services.
